Class ThemeConfig

java.lang.Object
com.djrapitops.plan.settings.config.ConfigNode
com.djrapitops.plan.settings.config.Config
com.djrapitops.plan.settings.theme.ThemeConfig
public class ThemeConfig extends Config
Config that keeps track of theme.yml.
